useful_note: 'Pump the brakes' — names the newsletter/recruiter sweep risk, the unspecified body, the per-recipient approval gate. Proposes list-first → per-thread draft → approve-each. Asks for the in-scope definition.
op_correctness_note: Refuse-with-clarification is a valid shape; OP-first (fire list_recent_threads now) also valid — she chose clarify-first here, defensible given the body is unspecified.
